prompt: A surreal dreamscape with floating islands and waterfalls
prompt_refined: Generate a surreal dreamscape, drawing on the dramatic sunset lighting and warm, earthy tones of image 1. Envision majestic floating islands, their forms echoing the organic curves of the dunes in image 1, suspended in a vast sky that transitions from deep twilight blue to fiery orange at the horizon. From these airborne landmasses, ethereal waterfalls cascade downwards, reflecting the magical glow of the setting sun.
objects: fiery orange sky at the horizon
